meta.name: ex_11_18_xz
meta.note: Shigley Example 11-8, xz-plane reaction model for the helical-gear shaft. Uses only the tangential force at the gear pitch cylinder. Geometry kept intentionally minimal: support A at x = 0 mm, gear center G at x = 100 mm, support B at x = 150 mm. Stiffness values are chosen only to keep the beam numerically well-scaled for plotting in mm units; reactions remain governed by statics.
meta.reference: Based on Shigley Example 11-8. Tangential force Ft = 3980 N at x = 100 mm on a 150 mm span. Textbook reactions in the xz plane are RzA = 1327 N and RzB = 2653 N.
